title: The Duel’s Sacred Rhythm
description: On pages 16–17, the duel’s sacred rhythm as usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards.
scene: The Duel’s Sacred Rhythm. Usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That means... this is a prehistoric island!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This island's still stuck in the age of dinosaurs!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: because of the difficulty in navigating from one island to another on Grand Line,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Foreign interaction is rare, giving rise to unique cultures on each island.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So if there are islands on which highly advanced people live...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then there can also be islands on which time has stopped still for thousands and thousands of years!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is all possible due to Grand Line's chaotic climate!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And so... this island is one such product of Grand Line's chaos...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's an island trapped back in the age of dinosaurs!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Don't ride on it!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Awesome!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: USOP! USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What, did you find the book?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We're in trouble! On this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crack.,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Ahhh hah! what

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: A YAA QAAA! AAA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To its inhabitants, this island is like a little garden.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: An island of giants, "Little Garden." That is what I have decided to name this island. -explorer Louis Arnote-

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the duel’s sacred rhythm. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
